# Cocoon API Proxy

> OpenAI-compatible API proxy for the Cocoon decentralized AI network on TON blockchain

## Overview
Cocoon API Proxy provides a standard OpenAI-format REST API with per-token billing and TON cryptocurrency payments. Drop-in replacement for any OpenAI client library — just change the base URL and API key.

## API Endpoints
- POST /v1/chat/completions — Generate AI text responses (streaming + non-streaming)
- GET /v1/models — List available AI models
- POST /v1/keys — Create a new API key and deposit code
- GET /v1/balance — Check account balance in TON
- GET /v1/deposit — Get wallet address and memo for TON deposits
- GET /health — Service health check

## Authentication
Bearer token auth with API keys prefixed `ck_`. Create keys via POST /v1/keys. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer ck_...`.

## Billing
Per-token usage-based pricing. Deposit TON cryptocurrency to fund your account. Cost deducted after each response. HTTP 402 returned when balance is insufficient.

## Quick Start
```python
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(api_key="ck_your_key", base_url="http://localhost:8000/v1")
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="Qwen/Qwen3-32B",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
)
```

## Links
- OpenAPI Spec: /openapi.json
- Agent Card: /.well-known/agent.json
- Source: https://github.com/knyazev741/cocoon-api-proxy
- Cocoon Network: https://cocoon.ws/
